2605.08061.title: Rubric-Grounded RL: Structured Judge Rewards for Generalizable Reasoning
2605.08061.paper_summary: We argue that decomposing reward into weighted, verifiable criteria and using an LLM judge to score them provides a partial-credit optimization signal: instead of a binary outcome or a single holistic score, each response is graded along multiple task-specific criteria. We formalize \emph{rubric-grounded reinforcement learning (RL)}: a framework in which the policy is optimized against a structured, multi-criterion reward produced by a frozen LLM judge that conditions on auxiliary grounding the policy never sees. We instantiate the framework by deriving rubrics from an Office of Scientific and Technical Information (OSTI)-derived corpus of roughly 100,000 scientific and technical documents and training Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). With GRPO-based training, the model achieves $71.7\%$ normalized reward on held-out rubric evaluation. The GRPO-tuned policy also improves over the base model on four reasoning benchmarks not derived from the training corpus -- GSM8K, MATH, GPQA Main, and GPQA Diamond. These results provide evidence that structured, document-grounded rewards can improve held-out rubric performance and induce transferable reasoning behaviors beyond the corpus used to construct the training environment.
2605.08061.paper_summary_zh: 我們主張將獎勵分解為加權的、可驗證的標準，並使用 LLM 評判者對其進行評分，提供了一種部分信貸的優化信號：每個回應沿著多個特定任務的標準進行評分，而不是二元結果或單一的整體分數。我們形式化了 \emph{基於評分標準的強化學習 (RL)}：這是一個框架，其中策略是針對由凍結的 LLM 評判者生成的結構化、多標準獎勵進行優化，而這些獎勵是基於輔助基礎，策略從未見過。我們通過從約 100,000 份科學和技術文件的科學技術信息辦公室 (OSTI) 衍生語料庫中推導評分標準，並使用群體相對政策優化 (GRPO) 訓練 Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct，來實現這一框架。通過基於 GRPO 的訓練，該模型在保留的評分標準評估中達到了 $71.7\%$ 的標準化獎勵。經過 GRPO 調整的策略在四個未從訓練語料庫衍生的推理基準上也超過了基準模型——GSM8K、MATH、GPQA Main 和 GPQA Diamond。這些結果提供了證據，表明結構化的、基於文件的獎勵可以改善保留的評分標準表現，並引發超出用於構建訓練環境的語料庫的可轉移推理行為。
2605.08061.author: Manish Bhattarai et.al.
2605.08061.authors: Manish Bhattarai, Ismael Boureima, Nishath Rajiv Ranasinghe, Scott Pakin, Dan O'Malley
